name: visiontranslate
description: Browser extension that translates text in images using OCR and machine translation. Supports PaddleOCR, MangaOCR (Japanese manga), and Tesseract.js with multiple translation backends.

scripts.build: npm run build:popup && npm run build:overlay
scripts.watch: concurrently --names popup,overlay --prefix-colors blue,green "BUILD_TARGET=popup vite build --watch" "BUILD_TARGET=overlay vite build --watch"
scripts.copy-tesseract: mkdir -p lib && cp node_modules/tesseract.js/dist/tesseract.esm.min.js node_modules/tesseract.js/dist/worker.min.js lib/ && cp node_modules/tesseract.js-core/tesseract-core*.wasm node_modules/tesseract.js-core/tesseract-core*.wasm.js lib/
